title: Playable product visual evidence and E2E gate
summary: Create reviewer-grade screenshot, video-adjacent debug evidence and E2E coverage proving visible NPC action, command-to-job flow, build/lamp completion and blocked reason handling.
acceptance: E2E and captured evidence prove the player can understand the first objective, issue lamp/build commands, see pawn claim/move/work/complete or blocked reason, and observe world/UI state change
Evidence includes zh-CN and en runs, 1280x720 and 1920x1080-or-larger captures, and at least one windowed/fullscreen-equivalent responsive matrix
Visual evidence demonstrates map-first hierarchy, visible pawn action and bottom action bar/inspector clarity instead of diagnostics/status-board dominance
Automated assertions inspect structured debug/read-model payloads for authoritative command/job state and do not rely only on screenshots
Report records any residual blockers honestly and does not change release/platform verdicts

history.details: Must wait for WM-0161 roadmap to reach verified/done and for WM-0162 reconciliation of the integrated GameSession recovery plan before any WM-0154 closeout semantics continue. Confirmed product facts show the old visual-evidence task cannot self-repair product implementation: real 1280x720 mouse hits on the East Market lamp are covered by HUD, existing E2E clickCanvasPoint dispatches PointerEvent directly to canvas instead of real input, normal speed has no sustained game clock, lamp refill completes in under 100 ms and is not player-perceptible, and the current product is still a static fixture plus two Pawn Worker slices.

PR-1 facts supersede the old no-clock/static-product wording: WM-0166/WM-0167/WM-0168 now prove one default authoritative GameSession, eight same-basis residents, a real Worker-owned 600-second clock and product-consumed moving/working publications. WM-0154 remains blocked because its historical screenshot/debug/synthetic-input evidence scope cannot implement or independently accept PR-2 autonomous life, PR-4 real-input UX or PR-5 playability. Do not claim or unblock it; WM-0174/WM-0175 own the new PR-2 evidence path, while WM-0155/WM-0156 remain proposed and frozen.

forbiddenPaths: new product feature implementation beyond tests/evidence repair

blocker.reason: PR-1 is complete and the old no-clock/static-product blocker facts are superseded: WM-0166/WM-0167/WM-0168 prove one default authoritative GameSession, eight same-basis residents, a real Worker-owned 600-second clock and product-consumed moving/working publications. WM-0154 nevertheless remains blocked because its historical screenshot/debug/synthetic-input evidence scope cannot implement or independently accept PR-2 autonomous life, PR-4 real-input UX or PR-5 playability. Do not claim or unblock it; WM-0174/WM-0175 own the new PR-2 evidence path, while WM-0155/WM-0156 remain proposed and frozen.
